visual_summary: Hero is a hero UI component from the floatui corpus. It provides reusable hero behavior and styling for React or web UI screens.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready hero component with the following characteristics: Name: Hero Description: Hero is a hero UI component from the floatui corpus. It provides reusable hero behavior and styling for React or web UI screens. Style: gradient, utility-styled Interactions: hover Tags: floatui, hero Requirements: - Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS - Uses Tailwind CSS for styling - Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation - Responsive and mobile-friendly - No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary - Include all necessary imports - Export as default with sensible prop types Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
